codeReview.summary: L5 (Logic and Bit Manipulation) successfully expanded from 3 sections/8,650 chars to 4 sections/39,397 chars. All validation assertions pass. Content is well-structured with proper markdown formatting (## headings, ### headings, code blocks) across all sections.

VAL-COVERAGE-001.evidence: L5 has exactly 4 sections: l5-s1 (8,855 chars), l5-s2 (10,223 chars), l5-s3 (8,981 chars), l5-s4 (11,338 chars)

VAL-COVERAGE-003.evidence: L5 has 39,397 total chars, far exceeding the 12,000 minimum. Individual sections: s1=8855, s2=10223, s3=8981, s4=11338

l5-s1 Logical Instructions.covers: AND, OR, XOR, NOT, TEST instructions with truth tables, flag effects, examples

l5-s2 Shift Instructions.covers: SHL, SHR, SAL, SAR instructions with bit movement visualization, arithmetic implications, multi-word shifts

l5-s3 Rotate Instructions.covers: ROL, ROR, RCL, RCR instructions with circular bit movement, carry flag interactions

l5-s4 Bit Masking and Applications.covers: Bit field extraction/insertion, ASCII digit conversion, packed BCD, 8-bit color format, flag register operations, bit array operations, checksum computation
